_meta.title: Data Protection to PCI DSS v4.0 Cross-Reference

mappings.description: Classification supports PCI scope definition and media classification
Encryption at rest directly satisfies PAN rendering requirements
Encryption in transit satisfies transmission encryption requirements
Tokenization as alternative to encryption for PAN protection
DLP supports data flow control and scope maintenance
Key management directly satisfies PCI key management requirements
Database controls support PAN masking, access control, and audit logging
Masking and tokenization support PAN display and test data requirements
Secure disposal satisfies PAN deletion and media destruction requirements
